commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he shall put off his garments, and put on other garments, and carry forth the ashes outside the camp unto a clean place. Others; such as were worn on common occasions, out of the tabernacle. And shall Hebrew has only, "unto a clean place "as the other versions and some Latin copies read. The meaning of the addition is, that all the bones, must be perfectly reduced to dust, before they be carried out of the camp.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
